summary: Live-applied ADR 0283 from the synchronized latest origin/main lineage by bringing Plausible Analytics under repo-managed automation on docker-runtime-lv3, publishing analytics.lv3.org through the shared NGINX edge with a public tracker and OIDC-gated dashboard, correcting the fresh-worktree edge-publication and certificate-admission gaps that surfaced during replay, and re-verifying bootstrap, public health, tracker injection, and synthetic analytics ingestion end to end.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_plausible_playbook.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_plausible_runtime_role.py` returned `13 passed` on the synchronized latest-main tree.

`uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, and `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-plausible` all passed after the fresh-worktree bootstrap and certificate-admission fixes landed.

`HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... make converge-plausible` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=145 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=21 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=18 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=3 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `nginx-lv3 : ok=40 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

A fresh guest-local probe kept `plausible`, `plausible-openbao-agent`, `plausible-events-db`, and `plausible-db` `Up`; `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8016/api/system/health/ready` returned `{"sessions":"ok","postgres":"ok","clickhouse":"ok","sites_cache":"ok"}`; and listeners remained present on `10.10.10.20:8016` and `127.0.0.1:8016`.

`https://analytics.lv3.org/api/system/health/ready` returned `{"sessions":"ok","postgres":"ok","clickhouse":"ok","sites_cache":"ok"}`, `https://nginx.lv3.org/` included the `https://analytics.lv3.org/js/script.js` tracker snippet, `curl -sSI https://analytics.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` to the oauth2 sign-in path with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`, and public DNS resolved `analytics.lv3.org` to `65.108.75.123`.
A synthetic POST to `https://analytics.lv3.org/api/event` returned `202 Accepted`, and the path `/plausible-e2e-1774861457` became visible in Plausible on poll attempt `2`.

notes: This receipt records the synchronized branch-local latest-main proof before the protected release, README, and canonical platform-truth surfaces are updated.

The first synchronized replay needed a manual provider bridge because the Hetzner DNS create task did not create the `analytics` A record; the record was created through the provider API with zone `qCw975uU3fTKT4KX66twh`, record `5184e68f92a5685cf566cdd884f3b57e`, value `65.108.75.123`, and ttl `60`, after which later governed replays observed the canonical state.

The next synchronized replay exposed that a fresh worktree must regenerate the shared edge static portals before `lv3.platform.nginx_edge_publication` republishes them, so `make converge-plausible` now runs `generate-edge-static-sites` and declares the `shared-edge-generated-portals` bootstrap manifest.

A follow-up replay then surfaced the public-endpoint admission gap for `analytics.lv3.org`; adding the `analytics-edge` certificate-catalog entry let the exposure audit pass and allowed the shared edge certificate expansion to complete cleanly.

VERSION, release sections in `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml` platform version, `build/platform-manifest.json`, the integrated `README.md` status summary, and the canonical exact-main receipt still remain for the final integration step on `main`.

correction_loop.surface: Hetzner DNS zone lv3.org and the shared NGINX edge publication bootstrap contract
correction_loop.repair_action: Created the missing `analytics` A record manually through the provider API, then fixed the fresh-worktree replay path by regenerating shared edge static portals before publication and admitting `analytics.lv3.org` into `config/certificate-catalog.json`.
correction_loop.verification: Subsequent preflight and converge replays passed, the public ready endpoint returned `ok`, tracker injection appeared on `nginx.lv3.org`, the dashboard stayed OIDC-gated with the expected crawl guards, and a synthetic public event reached Plausible on poll attempt `2`.
